build.beforeDevCommand: bash -lc 'if nc -z 127.0.0.1 5173; then echo Vite dev server already running; else if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend; else cd ../frontend; fi && npm run dev; fi'
build.beforeBuildCommand: bash -lc 'if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend; else cd ../frontend; fi && npm run build'
